UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores user preferences and current state in the election guide.

ChatMessage.title: Chat Message
ChatMessage.description: A single message in the chat history.

EngagementEvent.title: Engagement Event
EngagementEvent.description: A discrete event logged for impact measurement.

users/{userId}.description: The root document for a user's data.

users/{userId}/messages/{messageId}.description: Subcollection storing the conversation history for a specific user.

engagement_analytics/{eventId}.description: Global collection for tracking user impact and feature engagement.
